children.heading: Definition
children.label: a Definition
children.text: In this section, the term “Commission” means the Federal Communications Commission.
title VIII of the Communications Act of 1934 ( et seq.); or47 U.S.C. 641

children.heading: Notice of initial broadband DATA collection filing deadline
children.label: c Notice of initial broadband DATA collection filing deadline

children.text: shall provide notice to broadband providers not later than 60 days before the initial deadline for submission of data under section 802(a)(1)(A) of the Communications Act of 1934 (); and47 U.S.C. 642(a)(1)(A)
notwithstanding any prior decision of the Commission to the contrary, shall not be required to provide notice not later than 6 months before the initial deadline described in paragraph (1).
